title: Quest Personal Blender & Smoothie Maker | 350 Watt | Includes 2x 600ml Portable Bottles | One Touch Button | Slimline, Portable and Compact | Stainless Steel Blades (Black & Grey)
features: QUEST PERSONAL BLENDER – Make your favourite drinks in minutes with this slimline, personal blender. It comes with two, BPA-free bottles so you can make two batches of any drink of your choice. As the blender attaches straight to the bottle for your convenience, there is no need to transfer your drink once it is mixed - just add your ingredients, blend and enjoy.

ONE TOUCH BUTTON – Pop your favourite ingredients into the Quest Nutri-Q 600ml Personal Blender. Its one-touch operation means you just place the bottle on to the base, twist to lock and then press the button to blend your drink – both quick and easy to save you time.

SLIMLINE, PORTABLE AND COMPACT - The streamline, modern design of the smoothie blender will look right at home in any kitchen. It is very easy to clean with BPA-free containers and dishwasher safe parts. Enjoy your delicious drink creations on the move with the handy carry handles on the lids of your bottles – ideal for taking to work, the gym or on a day out.

STAINLESS STEEL BLADES - The blender’s powerful motor and stainless-steel blades will blend fruits and crush ice quickly and efficiently. Its high-quality blades make it ideal for slushes, smoothies, cocktails, milkshakes and protein shakes.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Stainless Steel Blades The three stainless steel blades ensure quick and precise blending, making it perfect for smoothies. Includes Two Bottles The blender features two 600ml bottles, giving you plenty of capacity for your drinks & smoothies. Secure Lid The lid features a locking clip to stay secure, as well as a carry handle for easy transport. One Touch Operation No complex settings are required - secure the bottle on, then just press the power button to start. Portable & Simple The blender attaches straight to the bottle, meaning there's no need to transfer your blended drink.
